OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Sharise Jackson
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nefateria Greenwood is present.
Attorney Nefateria Greenwood representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately in the conference room for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
